title: World emoji day and new reactions capabilities!
excerpt: Did you know that July 17th is world emoji day?! Online communication channels has gotten more personal over the years and team members want to express themselves, celebrate successes and acknowledge communication in a w…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that July 17th is world emoji day?! Online communication channels has gotten more personal over the years and team members want to express themselves, celebrate successes and acknowledge communication in a way that is more personal. In honor of world emoji day, I am excited to share our latest feature release - emoji reactions!

How can reactions benefit your team?

  • Familiar and quick way of answering updates

  • Improved communication and collaboration between teams

  • Quick way to express support or celebrate accomplishments

Give it a try and let us know what you think!
